obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Primary filled button backgrounds, display heading text on white surfaces — the system's anchor dark, nearly true black

ink.$description: Ink — Body text, nav text, badge text on light surfaces — one shade lighter than Obsidian, used for reading-weight text

graphite.$description: Graphite — Button borders, badge backgrounds (dark variant), border strokes across components — the dominant UI border tone

slate.$description: Slate — Mid-dark card backgrounds in dark sections, subtle icon fills

steel.$description: Steel — Muted body copy, helper text labels such as stat captions

ash.$description: Ash — Subdued heading variants, placeholder text, decorative rule strokes

pebble.$description: Pebble — Hairline dividers, inactive link backgrounds, lightest visible border on white cards

fog.$description: Fog — Card backgrounds (mid variant), badge borders, section dividers — the second surface step above the canvas

mist.$description: Mist — Page canvas, light card backgrounds, tag/link hover surface — the dominant background tone

snow.$description: Snow — White card surfaces, input backgrounds, button fill for outlined variant — the brightest surface in the stack

ember.$description: Ember — YC batch badge backgrounds — vivid orange signals startup-ecosystem provenance, appears only on badge-sized labels

orchid-flash.$description: Orchid Flash — Decorative card wash accent — single-use vivid pink on a large card background to punctuate the portfolio grid

cosmica.$description: The sole typeface across the entire system — every badge, button, nav link, heading, and body copy uses Cosmica. Its wide weight range means all typographic hierarchy is weight-driven rather than family-switching. At 56–64px the light-to-medium weights feel assertive without shouting; at 10–14px the medium-to-semibold weights keep small labels legible at compact density.
